text: Try to make this reusable validation machinery, not just guardrails inside Issue.from_path(). T-48 (editor flow) and T-78 (doctor/lint) will likely want the same field, type, and dependency checks.

Copilot's point is right: build shared validation machinery. Suggestion: add Issue.validate() → list[str] (returns list of error strings, empty = valid). Reuse in from_path() (warn/raise), T-48 editor flow (show errors, offer re-edit), and T-78 doctor command. Define 'valid' as: required fields present, deps are valid ticket IDs, priority in 1-5 range, labels are non-empty strings.

implementation should be minimal. just a proper, human-readable print in the exception handler + terminate cleanup with an appropriate exit code. nothing fancy. validation machine can be added later if it really is of interest. keep it simple for now.
close T-92 as part of this
